prerequisites: An active VWO (Wingify) account with access to the VWO REST API.
A VWO API authentication token for that account (this is the value used for the connector's api_key field).
A start date to bound the initial sync (the start_date config field); records on or after this date are extracted.

authMethods.name: API token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: VWO authenticates REST API requests with an account-level API key. The connector sends this value in the HTTP header named 'token', per VWO's OpenAPI security scheme (type apiKey, in header, name token). Provide it in the connector's required api_key field. Requests are scoped to your VWO account/workspace via the /accounts/{account_id} path (use 'current' for the main workspace).

setupSteps.title: Obtain your VWO API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your VWO (Wingify) account and obtain an API authentication token for the account. This token is what the VWO REST API expects in its 'token' request header and is the credential the connector uses for authentication.

setupSteps.title: Configure the api_key field
setupSteps.body: Paste the VWO API token into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as the 'token' header against the VWO API base URL https://app.wingify.com/api/v2 when extracting your account's data.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date you want to extract from. The connector uses this as the lower bound for the initial sync window.
